Cuddlefish | Hand Roll | Temaki | Dunwoody | Coffee | Bakery
top of page
How to Properly Enjoy Temaki with the Nori Wrap
Hand Roll Bar,
Coffee, Bakery & Market
in The Heart of Dunwoody, GA
Book Now
Cuddlefish, located in Dunwoody, GA, within the new High Street development, is an innovative restaurant that brings together the best of Japanese and Taiwanese flavors, specializing in handcrafted sushi-style hand rolls made with the freshest ingredients. Guests can indulge in a unique temaki tasting menu at our chef’s counter, offering an interactive and personalized dining experience.
Enhancing the ambiance, the space also features a takeout market with sushi-grade seafood, premium ingredients, selected snacks, coffee beans, tea, and specialty goods available for purchase. Complementing the concept is a specialty coffee and bakery section, led by ChingYao Wang, where artisanal pastries and expertly brewed coffee are crafted daily.
The beverage program at Cuddlefish showcases a carefully curated selection of beers, wines, and original sake creations, designed to enhance and harmonize with our culinary offerings.
Under the leadership of Michelin-starred chef Jason Liang, the restaurant delivers precision, quality, and creativity for an unforgettable dining experience.
